Executive summary  
Users seeking alternatives to traditional on-premise s (on-prem)  infrastructure and 
services  have turned to cloud technology increasingly over the years . The purpose of this cybersecurity information sheet (CSI) is to  explain some of the 
common threats to cloud identity management , and  to recommend best practices 
organizations should employ to mitigate these threats  when operating in the cloud . Identity and access 
management (IAM) is critical to securing cloud resources from MCAs. For example, according to Website Planet, whose se

instruction: What is the credential access tactic with its technique?
input:

Initial Access  Phishing [ T1566 ] 
Initial Access  Trusted Relationship [ T1199 ] 
Credential Access  Multi -Factor Authentication Request Generation [ T1621 ]
